title: Get GPO Status
description: Retrieves the current GPO port states.

command.description: The value for the key command must be get_gpoStatus. Maximum number of ports available per device type: FX7500 = 3 GPO pins, FX9600 = 4 GPO pins, ATR7000 = 3 GPO pins.

command_id.description: A unique ID that will be echoed back in the command response by the reader.
